sprints.name: Test Infrastructure Foundation
sprints.theme: Scaffolding: directory structure, test helper, fixtures, and run.sh entry point

sprints.name: Pure Function Unit Tests
sprints.theme: Unit tests for all stateless pure functions in harness/lib/utils.sh
features: F4: Unit Tests for Pure Functions (meta-tests/test-utils-pure.bats)

sprints.name: State Management Unit Tests
sprints.theme: Tests for state-mutating functions: init_harness_state, log_cost, update_progress, update_handoff, update_regression_registry
features: F5: Unit Tests for State Management Functions (meta-tests/test-utils-state.bats)

sprints.name: Git Operation Tests
sprints.theme: Tests for all git.sh functions using isolated temporary git repositories

sprints.name: Hook Validation Tests
sprints.theme: Tests for on-generator-stop.sh, on-evaluator-stop.sh, and on-stop.sh exit codes and error messages

sprints.name: Edge Cases and Polish
sprints.theme: Boundary conditions, malformed input, error recovery, and run.sh integration verification
features: F8: Edge Case and Error Handling Tests (meta-tests/test-edge-cases.bats)
